name: Jello Lemon Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lemon jello pie filling and allow it to cool completely.
2. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form.
3. Cut the glazed cherries in half.
4. Add the cooled jello pie filling to the whipped cream.
5. Add the halved cherries to the mixture.
6. Place lady fingers in a spring form pan lined with parchment paper.
7. Pour the jello and cherry mixture over the lady fingers.
8. Decorate with dollops of whipped cream and additional cherries, if desired.
